title: VACCINATION CLINIC - 211info
text: UMPQUA COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER MYRTLE CREEK VACCINATION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations, as well as tuberculosis screenings. Influenza (flu) and COVID-19 vaccines are provided to both adults and children as the vaccine becomes available each season. 790 S Main Street Myrtle Creek, OR 97457 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 860-4070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 860-4070 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances and offers sliding scale fees. No child will be turned away from receiving vaccinations because of inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Tuberculosis Screening Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMPQUA COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER MYRTLE CREEK
